tools.name: catalog
tools.description: Free: machine-readable product catalog of agentfeeds.jp (Japan regulatory & market data for AI agents). Factual data only; not investment advice.

tools.name: get_terms
tools.description: Free: license terms and disclaimer for agentfeeds.jp data.

tools.name: reg_events
tools.description: Paid ($0.01/call): Japan digital & financial regulatory events (crypto, AML/sanctions, tax, AI) in English, human-reviewed. Factual data; not investment or legal advice.

tools.name: dex_spread_summary
tools.description: Paid ($0.002/call): 1-minute cross-venue DEX spread statistics (WETH/USDC on Base, SOL/USDC via Jupiter). Descriptive statistics only; not investment advice.

tools.name: dex_spread_anomalies
tools.description: Paid ($0.005/call): DEX spread anomaly events (1-min |spread| above trailing 30-day p99). Descriptive statistics only; not investment advice.

tools.name: sanctions_check
tools.description: Paid ($0.002/call): screen a crypto address against Japan MOF asset-freeze sanctions designations. Factual screening data; not legal advice.
